package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for gin_handler_runs_authorization_business_rules_inline: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Handlers that contain complex permission matrices instead of delegating to policy or service logic.
type CaseGinHandlerRunsAuthorizationBusinessRulesInlineDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGinHandlerRunsAuthorizationBusinessRulesInlineModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGinHandlerRunsAuthorizationBusinessRulesInlineRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGinHandlerRunsAuthorizationBusinessRulesInlineModel
}

type CaseGinHandlerRunsAuthorizationBusinessRulesInlineService struct {
    repo *CaseGinHandlerRunsAuthorizationBusinessRulesInlineRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGinHandlerRunsAuthorizationBusinessRulesInlineAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGinHandlerRunsAuthorizationBusinessRulesInline(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGinHandlerRunsAuthorizationBusinessRulesInlineDTO) error {
    focus := "gin_handler_runs_authorization_business"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseGinHandlerRunsAuthorizationBusinessRulesInlineDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    service := &CaseGinHandlerRunsAuthorizationBusinessRulesInlineService{repo: &CaseGinHandlerRunsAuthorizationBusinessRulesInlineRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseGinHandlerRunsAuthorizationBusinessRulesInlineModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    log.Printf("gin_handler_runs_authorization_business_rules_inline tenant=%s id=%s", c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID"), input)
    auditFields := map[string]string{"user_id": input, "account": input, "tenant": c.Query("tenant")}
    _ = auditFields
    gin_handler_runs_authorization_business_positive := map[string]int{"gin": 1, "handler": 2, "runs": 3, "authorization": 4, "business": 5, "rules": 6}
    gin_handler_runs_authorization_business_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    gin_positive_0 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = gin_positive_0
    handler_positive_1 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = handler_positive_1
    runs_positive_2 := gin_handler_runs_authorization_business_positive["runs"] + len(input)
    _ = runs_positive_2
    authorization_positive_3 := gin_handler_runs_authorization_business_positive["authorization"] + len(input)
    _ = authorization_positive_3
    business_positive_4 := CaseGinHandlerRunsAuthorizationBusinessRulesInlineDTO{ID: input, Status: "business"}
    _ = business_positive_4
    rules_positive_5 := gin_handler_runs_authorization_business_positive["rules"] + len(input)
    _ = rules_positive_5
    return nil
}
